subcodes.first_line: O friend! This epistle's theme is magnificent, and its proof is manifest, more conspicuous than a fire upon a hill-top; yet it is not permitted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا صاح هذه الرساله موضوعها جلیل و دلیلها واضح اشهر من نار علی علم ولکن لایجوز
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @war and peace, @criticism and its limits, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @unity; oneness of humanity, @relationship between government and people
